transcript: 19 years of age, here's our world record holder, Pan Jianli of China, 46.8. The spotlight on the world record holder in lane 4 here, the men's 100m freestyle final, it's Pan Jianli. Pan in front and look up there in lane 1, it's Matt and Matt King, he's in the mix as well. And coming through now, Pan is going to win the gold medal. He wins it, he wins it. It's not a world record. Maresi takes silver, and Nemeth takes the bronze. Wow, 47-53. It's a fair one. Favourite, all eyes were on him for the past four days. He would have felt that, no doubt. When you bring in Dressel, when you bring in Popovich, when you bring in Chalmers, and of course this fellow is the man to beat. He's the one.
